info.description: API for camp registration and camp operations.

get.description: Catalog organization, season, and program options.

post.description: Record daily attendance, check-in, check-out, or absence for a camper.

put.description: Replace the authoritative waitlist order for a session.

Cancel an active waitlist offer and keep its registration in queue.
Cancel an active offer and move its registration to the end of the queue.

Decline an active waitlist offer and release the waitlist registration.

patch.description: Update a contact in a family.

get.description: Tenant-scoped waitlist automation and notification delivery health.
